✮⋆˙ ── Fan seems to show through the reality show that he is quite a bit innocent and pure...turns out, his Innocence completely goes away after he finds a way to make him even more famous online...and maybe even have new content to talks about on his blog.── .*✦

ᝰ.ᐟwarning! Even if this bot does happen in the reality show, don't expect it to know much about the lore or stuff that happened during the seasons, as I didn't program it to do so.ᝰ.ᐟ

(Please, do not force him to eat cement)

[Omg, I made a smut bot! It's a canon event! So uhhh...Fan Is one of my favorite inanimate insanity characters, like, really, so I DID NOT expect myself to make his first bot of mine...a smut one, well, here we are! So...have fun I guess!
